description_long: This is a compact outdoor playground set within a rectangular, walled grassy enclosure. The main feature is a wooden multi-play structure with a small tower, a slide, a climbing wall, and a ladder, all constructed from natural wood. Adjacent to the main structure is a wooden bench and a fenced-off area, likely for younger children or as a safety measure. The playground is bordered by white walls on three sides, providing a sense of enclosure and separation from the surrounding environment. The ground is covered with green artificial turf or grass, offering a soft play surface. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on natural materials and basic play elements.
description: A compact, walled playground featuring a wooden multi-play structure with a slide, climbing wall, and fenced area on a grassy surface. The design is simple, functional, and uses natural wood elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wooden play structure, fenced area, and bench along the left wall, with the grassy play area extending to the right.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main play structure with its slide and climbing wall, and the open grassy area in the foreground.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced section and the back of the play structure, with the bench and open space visible.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite end, showing the length of the playground, the play structure, and the bench aligned along the wall.
